description: 24 - 24-01-2025 - Emails between Michael Roberts (Assurance Deputy Director, CO) and others
text:
Re: P.M's vetting interview. 24 January 2025 at 14:23

Michael Roberts Personal
To: JCS

Jc , good afternoon.

| was wondering if | could ask a small favour - would it be possible to get any feedback from Lord Mandelson on his
experience with vetting...? | appreciate that he is extraordinarily busy and am not looking for chapter and verse. We have
had quite a bit of senior interest in the processing of this case (not the details merely that it goes smoothly) and would
like to assure folk that it went well... Which | think it did!?

best,
Michael

On Fri, 24 Jan 2025 at 09:00, JCS wrote:
OFFICIAL

Ignore this! He's now managed to join via Google
Meet

Sent rom Outlook Tor 10S

OFFICIAL

From: Jes

Sent: Friday, January 24, 2025 8:59:07 AM

To: Jos

Cc: Jes Michael Roberts Personal
JCS

Subject: Re: P.M's vetting interview.
Hi all,

Peter is struggling to join via Google Meets. Is there any possibility of doing this via a Teams call
instead? He's familiar with that system.

(Sorry--he's not in London today so | can't assist in person)
Jcs

Sent from Outlook for iOS

From: JCS

Sent: Tuesday, January 21, 2025 11:33:26 AM

To: JCs

Cc: Jes Michael Roberts Personal

E JCS
Subject: RE: P.M's vetthg interview.

Fantastic, thank you! 0900 — 1100 on Friday is confirmed. I'll tell him to expect a scheduler from you

JCS | Head of US Global Issues and Canada Team | US and Canada Denartment | Americas and SIDS

 and an early start would be helpful as it is likely to take up to 2hrs for the additional
sections as they will be complex.  If it is okay, from a 'tech' point of view it would be easier for us to use his Global
email address as the point of contact, as Google Meet is the more reliable option for

the invite to both addresses and then I'm sure we can connect one way or the other.
Regards

OFFICIAL
Thanks 
. That’s all clear. I’ll block 1100-1200 in his diary. If you need more time we could start
at 1030? Could you send to both his Global Counsel email *and* 
. I
am encouraging him to use his FCDO address now, but he is still getting familiar with FCDO tech
(he’s used to Apple laptops) so useful to have his GC address as a fallback.
I’ll reiterate the point on the foreign contacts form.

From: Jes

Sent: 21 January 2025 09:53
To: Jes
Ce: Jes eiictige! Roberts Personal

Subject: Re: P.M's vetting interview.
Good morning JCS

| can confirm that 11am on Friday 24th January is fine for the additional interview. As discussed, this will be
conducted virtually via Google Meet and the Vetting Clearance Officer conducting the meeting will be JC

(cc'd into this email). JCS will need to send a meeting invite to Lord Mandleson with the joinirfy link -
can you confirm the email address that we can use for this please, will it be his Global Counsel address?

In order for us to capture the remaining sections as fully as possible on Friday, may | again emphasise the need
to have the completed foreign contacts form sent to us ahead of the interview.

Many thanks
Jcs

JCS

Special Handling Vetting Manager

UKSV, Government Security Group (GSG), Cabinet Office
Email: Personal

NSV Privacy Notice.

Many thanks

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
